title: Withings Measurement Payload
description: Standardized data schema for Withings Body+ measurements in the Comfortage project.

measurementType.description: Details about the type of measurement taken.

typeValue.description: The numerical ID representing the measurement type (e.g., 1 for Weight, 4 for Height).

typeDescription.description: A human-readable description of the measurement type (e.g., 'Weight').

attrib.description: Attribute status of the measurement (e.g., 0 for normal, 2 for user-assigned).

measurementDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the measurement was taken.

createdDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the record was created in the system.

modifiedDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the record was last modified.

measurementValue.description: The actual value of the measurement (e.g., 88.441).
